message:
feat(browser): Add LocalDatabase with CRUD operations and ACID support

- Add LocalDatabase class with manifest-based ACID transactions
- Implement SQL parser for CREATE/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/SELECT
- Add fragment-based storage with deletion vectors (Lance pattern)
- Support CREATE TABLE, DROP TABLE, INSERT INTO, UPDATE, DELETE
- SELECT with WHERE, ORDER BY, LIMIT, aggregations
- Add vector column support (VECTOR type with dimension)
- Add persistence test with MemoryStorage mock
- Enable ES modules in package.json

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "@lanceql/browser",
   "version": "0.1.0",
+  "type": "module",
   "description": "Query Lance columnar files in the browser with SQL and vector search",
   "main": "dist/lanceql.js",
   "module": "dist/lanceql.esm.js",
